instructions: Report discrepancy in this certificate to Head of the institution.
This certificate of marks is issued as per prevailing rules and regulations of MSBTE at the time of this exam.
Eligibility for III semester is based on total number of failure subjects in I & II semesters taken together.

Candidate is eligible for admission to V/VII Semester only if he/she is fully passed in I & II / III & IV semesters and availed benefit of A.T.K.T/PASS at II & IV / V & VI semesters taken together respectively.
Class awarded for Diploma is based on aggregate marks obtained in pre-final & final semester.

abbreviations.WFLS: With Held On account of Lower Semester Pending
abbreviations.WFLY: With Held On account of Lower Year Pending
abbreviations.†: Credits of this Skill Based Course considered for First Year Exit

passingRule: Minimum 40% of Maximum marks required to pass in respective passing head separately
